creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text: No idea. Perhaps I am wrong. Now I recall that transitioned to stable/13 on affected machines relatively late, and the bug was reported here even later. I wonder if lagg(4) has anything to do with it, since in the report of bug 268490, using lagg(4) has also been noted. I am utilising lagg on all affected setups, think I can check if it's lagg dependent this weekend.
